summary: Add undo and redo support to the demo editor with keyboard shortcuts and tests.
assumptions: The editor state is centralized in the existing editor store.

epic.title: Add undo/redo to editor
epic.description: Implement undo and redo support according to the approved Humanize Flow plan.

tasks.title: Design editor history model
tasks.description: Add a history model that stores undo and redo stacks without changing unrelated editor behavior.
acceptance_criteria: History state supports undo and redo for normal text edits.

tasks.title: Wire undo/redo keyboard shortcuts
tasks.description: Connect Cmd/Ctrl+Z and Cmd/Ctrl+Shift+Z to the editor history model.
acceptance_criteria: Keyboard shortcuts invoke undo and redo in supported platforms.

tasks.title: Add undo/redo tests
tasks.description: Add targeted tests for undo and redo behavior.
acceptance_criteria: New tests cover undo and redo behavior and existing tests pass.
